name: Harvest Ridge
shortDescription: Lennar community in southeast Aurora with attainable pricing and quick move-in options.
longDescription: Harvest Ridge is a Lennar community in southeast Aurora offering a range of single-family homes and townhomes at attainable price points. The community features quick move-in homes and is well-positioned for commuters with easy access to E-470.

name: Eastcreek Farm
shortDescription: Growing Lennar community in Thornton with paired homes and single-family options.
longDescription: Eastcreek Farm offers Lennar's signature Everything's Included homes in Thornton. The community includes both paired homes and traditional single-family floor plans with easy access to I-25 and downtown Denver.

name: Parterre
shortDescription: Multi-builder Thornton community with diverse housing types from the high $300s.
longDescription: Parterre is a growing master-planned community in Thornton featuring both Lennar and Taylor Morrison. With paired homes starting in the high $300s and single-family options, it offers some of the most attainable new construction in the north metro.

name: Willow Bend
shortDescription: Premium Lennar community in Thornton with larger single-family homes.
longDescription: Willow Bend offers Lennar's premium single-family homes in Thornton with spacious floor plans and upgraded finishes. The community targets move-up buyers looking for more space in the north metro.

name: Vermilion Creek
shortDescription: Lennar community in Centennial with competitive pricing and Cherry Creek schools.
longDescription: Vermilion Creek brings Lennar's Everything's Included value to Centennial. Located in the Cherry Creek School District, it offers single-family homes at competitive price points for the south metro area.

name: Newlin Crossing
shortDescription: Premium Lennar single-family homes in Parker with Douglas County schools.
longDescription: Newlin Crossing offers Lennar's premium single-family floor plans in Parker. With Douglas County schools and proximity to Mainstreet Parker, it targets families looking for quality new construction in one of the south metro's most desirable cities.

name: Macanta
shortDescription: Upscale multi-builder Castle Rock community with estate-sized lots and mountain views.
longDescription: Macanta is one of Castle Rock's premier new construction communities, featuring builders like Lennar, Taylor Morrison, and Toll Brothers. The community offers estate-sized lots with mountain views, premium finishes, and a resort-style amenity package.

name: Harvest Crossing
shortDescription: Multi-builder Aurora community with single-family homes in the mid $500s.
longDescription: Harvest Crossing features Richmond American and Pulte Homes in southeast Aurora. The community offers a range of single-family floor plans with Cherry Creek School District access and proximity to Southlands shopping.

name: Brighton Crossings
shortDescription: Growing Brighton community with Richmond American and KB Home offering competitive pricing.
longDescription: Brighton Crossings is a growing community in Brighton featuring Richmond American and KB Home. The community offers competitive pricing for single-family homes with easy access to I-76 and growing commercial amenities.

name: Cityscape at Dove Valley
shortDescription: Premium Richmond American homes in Centennial's Dove Valley with Cherry Creek schools.
longDescription: Cityscape at Dove Valley offers Richmond American's premium single-family homes in an established Centennial neighborhood. With Cherry Creek schools and proximity to the Denver Tech Center, it appeals to professionals and families alike.

name: Vista Pines at Crystal Valley
shortDescription: Premium Crystal Valley community with mountain views and multiple builder options.
longDescription: Vista Pines at Crystal Valley is part of the larger Crystal Valley master plan in Castle Rock. Featuring Richmond American and Toll Brothers, the community offers premium single-family homes with stunning mountain views and access to Crystal Valley's extensive amenity package.

name: Colliers Hill
shortDescription: Richmond American community in Erie with premium homes and mountain views.
longDescription: Colliers Hill brings Richmond American's premium floor plans to Erie's growing market. The community offers spacious single-family homes with mountain views and access to Erie's excellent schools and growing downtown.

name: The Aurora Highlands
shortDescription: Major multi-builder master plan in southeast Aurora with resort-style amenities.
longDescription: The Aurora Highlands is one of the largest new master-planned communities in the Denver metro, featuring four major builders. With resort-style amenities, proximity to DIA, and a growing commercial district, it's positioned as Aurora's flagship new development.

name: Buckley Yard
shortDescription: Attainable Richmond American homes in Aurora near Buckley Air Force Base.
longDescription: Buckley Yard offers Richmond American's most attainable single-family homes in Aurora. Located near Buckley Space Force Base, the community provides accessible pricing for military families and first-time buyers.

name: Crossway at Second Creek
shortDescription: Richmond American community in Commerce City with growing amenities.
longDescription: Crossway at Second Creek offers Richmond American single-family homes in Commerce City. The community benefits from the area's rapid growth and improving commercial infrastructure while maintaining competitive pricing.

name: Cobblestone Ranch
shortDescription: Premium Castle Rock community with estate lots and mountain views.
longDescription: Cobblestone Ranch offers Richmond American's premium estate-lot homes in Castle Rock. The community features large homesites, mountain views, and Douglas County schools, targeting executive buyers.

name: Canyon Creek
shortDescription: KB Home community in Erie with both classic single-family and paired home options.
longDescription: Canyon Creek offers KB Home's classic and villa collections in Erie. With both single-family and paired home options, the community provides attainable pricing in one of the north metro's fastest-growing towns.

name: Murphy Creek
shortDescription: Established Aurora community with golf course, multiple builders, and attainable pricing.
longDescription: Murphy Creek is an established community in Aurora built around the Murphy Creek Golf Course. KB Home and Meritage Homes offer new construction within the community, providing attainable single-family homes with resort-style amenities.

name: Windler
shortDescription: Attainable KB Home community in Aurora with single-family and paired home options.
longDescription: Windler offers some of the most attainable new construction in Aurora with KB Home's Wildflower and Villas collections. The community features both single-family and paired homes starting in the high $300s.

name: Farmlore
shortDescription: Multi-builder Brighton community with diverse pricing from the high $300s.
longDescription: Farmlore brings KB Home and Taylor Morrison to Brighton with a range of housing types. From paired villas to premium single-family homes, the community offers something for first-time buyers through move-up families.

name: Turnberry
shortDescription: Affordable KB Home community in Commerce City starting in the high $300s.
longDescription: Turnberry offers some of the most affordable new construction in the Denver metro with KB Home's single-family and villa collections. Located in Commerce City with quick access to I-76 and DIA.

name: Terrain
shortDescription: Master-planned community with mountain views and top-rated Douglas County schools.
longDescription: Terrain in Castle Rock is one of the most popular master-planned communities along the I-25 corridor. Multiple builders offer a wide range of floor plans with mountain views, extensive trails, and Douglas County schools.

name: Windsong
shortDescription: KB Home single-family community in Thornton with convenient highway access.
longDescription: Windsong offers KB Home's single-family homes in Thornton with convenient access to I-25 and Highway 7. The community targets families looking for new construction in the north metro with solid school options.

name: Montaine
shortDescription: Luxury Toll Brothers community in Castle Rock with estate and 55+ collections.
longDescription: Montaine is Toll Brothers' premier Castle Rock community offering both estate-sized homes and a Regency 55+ collection. The community features stunning foothill views, resort-style amenities, and Douglas County schools.

name: Ken-Caryl Ranch
shortDescription: Premium community in Ken-Caryl with Toll Brothers and Lennar near Red Rocks.
longDescription: Ken-Caryl Ranch offers premium new construction from Toll Brothers and Lennar in one of Littleton's most desirable established neighborhoods. Near Red Rocks and with access to Ken-Caryl's legendary amenity package.

name: ParkVue on the Platte
shortDescription: Toll Brothers townhomes in Littleton along the Platte River trail system.
longDescription: ParkVue on the Platte offers Toll Brothers' luxury townhomes in Littleton with direct access to the Mary Carter Greenway along the Platte River. The community targets professionals seeking low-maintenance luxury living.

name: Erie Town Center
shortDescription: Toll Brothers townhomes in Erie's growing downtown with walkable amenities.
longDescription: Erie Town Center offers Toll Brothers townhomes in Erie's emerging downtown district. The walkable location provides access to restaurants, shops, and Erie's growing entertainment scene.

name: Toll Brothers at Cherry Creek Trail
shortDescription: Premium Toll Brothers single-family homes along Parker's Cherry Creek Trail.
longDescription: Toll Brothers at Cherry Creek Trail offers luxury single-family homes in Parker with direct trail access. The community features premium finishes, spacious lots, and Douglas County schools.

name: Heights at DTC
shortDescription: Toll Brothers luxury townhomes near the Denver Tech Center.
longDescription: Heights at DTC offers Toll Brothers luxury townhomes in Centennial, steps from the Denver Tech Center. Ideal for professionals seeking low-maintenance living with premium finishes and walkable dining.

name: Painted Prairie
shortDescription: Major master plan in Aurora with 6 builders and diverse housing from the mid $300s.
longDescription: Painted Prairie is Aurora's flagship master-planned community with six active builders offering everything from paired villas to premium single-family homes. The growing commercial village, extensive trail network, and community programming make it one of the most complete new communities in the metro.

name: Trailstone
shortDescription: Taylor Morrison community in Arvada with townhomes and single-family options.
longDescription: Trailstone offers Taylor Morrison homes in Arvada with both townhome and single-family options. The community provides access to extensive trail systems and is conveniently located near Olde Town Arvada's shops and restaurants.

name: Buffalo Highlands
shortDescription: Meritage Homes energy-efficient community in Commerce City.
longDescription: Buffalo Highlands offers Meritage Homes' energy-efficient single-family homes in Commerce City. Known for their high-performance building standards, Meritage delivers lower utility costs and healthier indoor air quality.

name: Horizon Uptown
shortDescription: Energy-efficient Meritage homes in Aurora with attainable pricing.
longDescription: Horizon Uptown offers Meritage Homes' energy-efficient single-family homes in Aurora at attainable price points. The community combines Meritage's signature building performance with convenient access to Aurora's growing east side.

name: Ridgeline Vista
shortDescription: Meritage Homes community in Brighton with energy-efficient construction.
longDescription: Ridgeline Vista brings Meritage Homes' energy-efficient construction to Brighton. The community offers single-family homes with competitive pricing and access to Brighton's growing retail and dining scene.

name: York Station
shortDescription: Meritage townhomes in Thornton with energy-efficient design and transit access.
longDescription: York Station offers Meritage Homes' energy-efficient townhomes in Thornton. The community provides attainable low-maintenance living with access to public transit and nearby shopping.

name: The Canyons
shortDescription: Shea Homes' premier Castle Pines community with 5 distinct collections.
longDescription: The Canyons is Shea Homes' flagship Colorado community in Castle Pines, featuring five distinct collections from Gallery to Luxe. The community offers stunning canyon views, resort-style amenities, and Douglas County schools in one of the south metro's most exclusive settings.

name: Solstice
shortDescription: Shea Homes community in Littleton with three collections and foothill views.
longDescription: Solstice offers three Shea Homes collections — Harmony, Horizon, and Stargaze — in Littleton's growing foothill corridor. The community features mountain views, resort amenities, and proximity to Chatfield State Park.

name: Lyric at RidgeGate
shortDescription: Mixed-use RidgeGate community with Shea Homes and Lokal from condos to estates.
longDescription: Lyric at RidgeGate is a mixed-use community in Lone Tree featuring Shea Homes and Lokal Homes. From Lokal's attainable condos to Shea's premium single-family Autograph collection, Lyric offers the widest range of housing types in the south metro. Adjacent to the RidgeGate light rail station.

name: Crescendo at The Aurora Highlands
shortDescription: Tri Pointe Homes neighborhood within The Aurora Highlands master plan.
longDescription: Crescendo is Tri Pointe Homes' neighborhood within The Aurora Highlands master plan. The community offers contemporary single-family designs with access to the master plan's extensive amenity package.

name: Candelas
shortDescription: Tri Pointe townhomes in Arvada's established Candelas master plan.
longDescription: Candelas offers Tri Pointe Homes townhomes within Arvada's popular Candelas master-planned community. With mountain views, established retail, and an extensive trail network, Candelas is one of the west metro's most complete communities.

name: Medley at Reunion Ridge
shortDescription: Tri Pointe single-family homes near Reunion's established amenity package.
longDescription: Medley at Reunion Ridge offers Tri Pointe Homes' contemporary single-family designs near Commerce City's established Reunion community. Residents benefit from proximity to Reunion's resort-style recreation center.

name: Pinery West
shortDescription: Upscale community near Parker with large lots and premium builder options.
longDescription: Pinery West offers one of the most desirable new construction experiences in the Parker area with Toll Brothers and Lennar.

name: Looking Glass
shortDescription: Growing Parker community with Richmond American and Dream Finders from paired to estate homes.
longDescription: Looking Glass is a growing Parker community featuring Richmond American's paired Duos and Legacy Pointe single-family homes alongside Dream Finders' Reserve collection. The community offers diverse pricing and housing types in Douglas County.

name: Sterling Ranch
shortDescription: Tech-forward master-planned community with 5 builders and mountain views near Roxborough.
longDescription: Sterling Ranch is one of Colorado's most ambitious master-planned communities with five active builders. Located near Roxborough State Park, it features built-in smart home technology, extensive trails, and stunning foothill views.

name: Reunion
shortDescription: Established master-planned community with resort-style amenities and attainable pricing.
longDescription: Reunion is one of the most established master-planned communities in the northeast Denver metro. The recreation center features resort-style pools, fitness facilities, and programming.

name: Geos
shortDescription: Dream Finders community in Arvada with attainable townhomes and single-family options.
longDescription: Geos offers Dream Finders Homes' attainable townhomes and single-family homes in Arvada. The community provides accessible new construction in the west metro with convenient access to downtown Denver.

name: Parkside West at Baseline
shortDescription: Dream Finders single-family homes in Broomfield's Baseline master plan.
longDescription: Parkside West at Baseline offers Dream Finders Homes' single-family floor plans within Broomfield's popular Baseline development. The community offers walkable retail, dining, and open space in one of the north metro's most desirable locations.

name: Skyline Ridge
shortDescription: Century Communities townhomes in Castle Pines with mountain views.
longDescription: Skyline Ridge offers Century Communities townhomes in Castle Pines. The community targets professionals and downsizers seeking low-maintenance living with mountain views in an exclusive south metro setting.

name: Hilltop at Inspiration
shortDescription: Pulte Homes community within Aurora's Inspiration master plan with resort amenities.
longDescription: Hilltop at Inspiration offers Pulte Homes' single-family designs within Aurora's Inspiration master plan. The community features resort-style amenities including pools, a fitness center, and extensive trails.

name: The Hub at Virginia Village
shortDescription: Lokal Homes townhomes in Denver's Virginia Village neighborhood.
longDescription: The Hub at Virginia Village offers Lokal Homes' modern townhomes in one of Denver's established neighborhoods. With walkable access to restaurants, shops, and the High Line Canal trail, it targets urban buyers seeking new construction without leaving the city.

name: Gateway Commons
shortDescription: Lokal Homes condos in Denver — most affordable new construction in the city.
longDescription: Gateway Commons offers Lokal Homes' condominiums in Denver, representing some of the most affordable new construction available in the city. The community targets first-time buyers seeking urban living at attainable price points.

name: Ascent at Inverness
shortDescription: Lokal Homes townhomes near Inverness business park in the south metro.
longDescription: Ascent at Inverness offers Lokal Homes townhomes near the Inverness business park. The community targets professionals working in the DTC/Inverness corridor seeking modern, low-maintenance new construction.

name: Arcadia
shortDescription: D.R. Horton paired homes in Denver with competitive pricing.
longDescription: Arcadia offers D.R. Horton's paired homes within Denver city limits. As one of the few new construction options in the city proper from a national builder, it provides competitive pricing for urban buyers.

name: Westerly
shortDescription: Wonderland Homes community in Erie with local builder quality and attention to detail.
longDescription: Westerly offers Wonderland Homes' locally designed single-family homes in Erie. As a respected Colorado-based builder, Wonderland delivers attention to detail and community-focused design that larger national builders often miss.

name: Three Hills
shortDescription: Meritage Homes near Morrison with foothill views and energy-efficient construction.
longDescription: Three Hills offers Meritage Homes' energy-efficient single-family homes near Morrison with stunning foothill views. The community provides access to hiking, Red Rocks, and mountain recreation while maintaining suburban convenience.
